prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约1604名，2023年跃升至约945名（前移659名），2024年进一步前移至约561名（前移384名），2025年约554名（仅前移7名）。近四年位次持续大幅前移，但前移速度逐年放缓，2025年已基本企稳，基准位次约554名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年21人、2023年20人、2024年10人、2025年11人；2026年计划仅4人，较2025年大幅缩招约64%，且仅保留人工智能新工科大师班（3人）和计算机科学与技术拔尖计划班（1人）两个顶尖专业。大幅缩招理论上降低录取门槛，但缩招的专业均为该校最高分专业，实际竞争激烈程度高于纯数量变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，2021-2026年稳定在28-32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校，对高分考生持续具有强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及2023年电信学部录取位次断档的历史舆情；抖音综合热度为较热（总排名第55位），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；未见2026年新增重大负面事件，历史舆情影响有限；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共10个学科：化学工程与技术A+、力学A、土木工程A、工商管理A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-。工科实力极为突出，与2026年招生的人工智能、计算机等热门专业高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能为2026年高热推荐专业，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程为高热推荐，均为该校强势方向，吸引高分考生报考意愿强烈。宁夏2026年高考总考生约66000人（数据标注不确定），按近年理科/物理类占比约66%估算，物理类考生约43560人，较2025年44491人略减约2%，竞争压力略有缓和。2026年；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；宁夏考生报考东北地区985高校需综合考虑地域偏好，但该校作为顶尖工科985，跨省吸引力不受明显影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移但2025年已企稳的趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩招64%且仅保留顶尖专业、考生总数略减、学校层次极高且优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素：，但考虑到缩招专业均为该校最高分王牌专业且社会热度高，实际竞争激烈程度高于纯数量估计，同时考生总数略减和声誉偏负面有轻微缓和作用。预测2026年最低位次约358名，区间258-458名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 1604, rising to about 945 in 2023 (a forward shift of 659), further advancing to about 561 in 2024 (a forward shift of 384), and to about 554 in 2025 (a forward shift of only 7). Over the past four years, rankings have continuously and significantly advanced, but the pace of advancement has slowed year by year, stabilizing in 2025 at a baseline ranking of about 554. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia: 21 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 4, a sharp reduction of about 64% compared to 2025, retaining only two top-tier majors: Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class (3 spots) and Computer Science and Technology National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program (1 spot). The significant reduction in enrollment theoretically lowers the admission threshold, but the reduced majors are the university's highest-scoring programs, making actual competition more intense than pure numerical changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28-32 range from 2021 to 2026, belonging to a top domestic engineering powerhouse, continuously strongly attractive to high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving historical public opinion about the ranking gap in the 2023 Telecommunications Department admission. Douyin comprehensive popularity is relatively hot (ranked 55th overall), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms. No major negative events in 2026 have been observed, and historical public opinion impact is limited. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 10 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanics A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. Engineering strength is extremely prominent, highly aligned with the 2026 enrollment hot majors like Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence are highly recommended hot majors for 2026, Electronics/Communication is a hot recommendation, Electrical Engineering is a hot recommendation, all of which are strong directions of the university, attracting high-scoring students with strong willingness to apply. In 2026, the total number of Ningxia college entrance examination candidates is about 66,000 (data annotation uncertain), with science/physics category accounting for about 66% in recent years, estimating about 43,560 physics category candidates, a slight decrease of about 2% compared to 44,491 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. In 2026; Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian City, Liaoning Province, not a local university in the province, with no local enrollment preference. Ningxia candidates applying for 985 universities in the Northeast region need to consider regional preferences comprehensively, but as a top engineering 985, cross-provincial attractiveness is not significantly affected.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of continuous forward shift in historical rankings but stabilization in 2025, the sharp 64% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan retaining only top-tier majors, a slight decrease in total candidates, extremely high university level, and strong alignment between advantageous disciplines and hot majors: However, given that the reduced majors are the university's highest-scoring flagship programs with high social popularity, actual competition is more intense than pure quantitative estimates, while the slight decrease in total candidates and slightly negative reputation have a minor mitigating effect. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 358, with a range of 258-458.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology only offers two top-tier majors in Ningxia's Physics Category: Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class (3 spots) and Computer Science and Technology Top Talent Program (1 spot), both at the highest difficulty level. The predicted ranking range is 258-458. It is recommended that candidates within this range adopt a sprint strategy; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<258) can boldly apply, while those near the lower limit (about 458) should proceed with caution. Due to the absence of moderate and safe-tier majors, the application risk is relatively high, and it is advisable to prepare other stable choices simultaneously.
